steps.action: Inspect editor and teleprompter sources for MarkdownPreview consumption.
steps.expected: Both views import and render the shared MarkdownPreview component.
steps.observed: EditorView imports MarkdownPreview and renders it in the preview panel; TeleprompterView imports the same component and renders it inside the viewport.

steps.action: Run focused Vitest coverage for MarkdownPreview, EditorView, and TeleprompterView.
steps.expected: gp-prose appears in both views and MarkdownPreview unit tests pass.
steps.observed: EditorView.test and TeleprompterView.test passed their gp-prose assertions; MarkdownPreview.test.tsx passed all 9 unit tests.

assertions.title: Shared UI components work correctly across views

steps.action: Inspect consumer views for shared RecDot and StatBlock usage.
steps.expected: TeleprompterView uses RecDot in the HUD and EditorView uses StatBlock in the status rail.
steps.observed: TeleprompterView renders RecDot with playing state; EditorView renders StatBlock entries for Words, Chars, and Read time.

steps.action: Run focused Vitest coverage for RecDot, StatBlock, EditorView, and TeleprompterView.
steps.expected: Consumer-view assertions and component unit tests pass.
steps.observed: TeleprompterView passed Rolling/Standby RecDot assertions; EditorView passed footer StatBlock assertions; RecDot and StatBlock unit test files both passed.

evidence.consoleErrors: Vitest/static surface only. Raw output captured; no failing errors for this assertion.

assertions.title: Settings propagation: speed, font, mirror apply to teleprompter

steps.action: Inspect teleprompter and app sources for settings propagation paths.
steps.expected: Speed changes flow through settingsStore; fontSize/lineHeight/mirrorHorizontal/highlightReadingLine affect TeleprompterView rendering.
steps.observed: App hotkey handlers update scrollSpeed through settingsStore; TeleprompterView applies fontSize and lineHeight inline, builds scaleX(-1) when mirrored, and conditionally renders ReadingLine.

steps.action: Run focused TeleprompterView and settingsStore tests.
steps.expected: Control-driven speed updates, reading-line visibility, mirror transform, and settings persistence tests pass.
steps.observed: TeleprompterView passed Faster/Slower, reading-line visibility, mirror transform, and line-step tests; settingsStore tests passed load/update persistence checks.

commands: npm run test:frontend -- --reporter=verbose src/editor/MarkdownPreview.test.tsx src/teleprompter/TeleprompterView.test.tsx src/editor/EditorView.test.tsx src/ui/StatBlock.test.tsx src/ui/RecDot.test.tsx src/App.test.tsx src/store/settingsStore.test.ts
evidence.consoleErrors: Vitest/static surface only. Raw output captured; pre-existing act warnings were present but did not fail the targeted assertions.

assertions.title: Overlay rect settings persist and restore on mount

steps.action: Inspect App/settings store bootstrap and teleprompter mount logic.
steps.expected: App loads persisted settings via LazyStore and TeleprompterView restores overlay rect from settings.
steps.observed: App calls loadSettings on mount; settingsStore uses LazyStore-backed persistence; TeleprompterView reads persisted overlay rect values and forwards them to ipc.setOverlayRect.

steps.action: Run focused App, settingsStore, and TeleprompterView tests.
steps.expected: LazyStore construction and persisted-rect restoration tests pass.
steps.observed: App.test confirmed LazyStore construction on mount; TeleprompterView.test confirmed viewport dimensions and set_overlay_rect payload match persisted overlay settings.

frictions.description: The focused Vitest run emitted React act warnings and expected mocked error-path stderr even though all targeted tests passed.
frictions.resolution: Used the passing exit code plus green assertion output and static source refs as the validation signal; preserved the raw transcript under mission evidence.

summary: Tested 4 assigned assertions with targeted vitest/static checks: all 4 passed. Focused validation covered 7 test files / 202 passing tests plus source verification for shared rendering, settings propagation, and LazyStore-backed overlay restoration.
